workerRules: Do not edit the contracts directory.
Do not modify unrelated implementation-plan items.
Write progress heartbeat before and after long operations.
Record commands run and their results in the item.
Emit completed only after code, docs, and tests are coherent.
Emit blocked with a concrete blocker instead of spinning.
qualityGateRules: Review only the claimed item and its declared dependencies.
Run the contract-required checks when available.
Reject missing tests unless the item records a defensible reason.
Escalate ambiguous product decisions to a human-review bean.
